name: Desview TP170 Portable Universal Teleprompter Camera
description: Film scripted presentations with a camcorder, DSLR, or webcam with a single device using the TP170 Portable Teleprompter from Desview.

features.Key Features :: 70/30 Beamsplitter Glass | Fits Devices 12.9 to 17" | Film with Webcam, DSLR, or Camcorder | 2.4 to 3.8" Camera Height Adjustment | Adjustable Teleprompter Base | Tablet Clamp | Collapsible Lens Hood with Drawstring | Prompting App, Remote Control
features.What's in The Box :: Desview TP170 Portable Teleprompter for Tablets and Smartphones | Beamsplitter Glass and Collapsible Hood | Teleprompter Base | Tablet Clamp | Height-Adjustable Mount | Remote Control | Dust Cloth | Hard Carrying Case
